items.html: *At the first time of each and every Zivug [coupling], of all the discernments of Zivugim in the whole of Atzilut, from Atik through AVI [Aba ve Ima, Father and Mother], there was still no one who would awaken to raise MAN [Mayin Nukvin, female waters] — which are the clarifications of the Melachim [kings] — to correct them. Rather, the male alone would awaken of itself to the Zivug, although there was no one to raise MAN. This is the meaning of the words Kad Salik beRe'uta ["when it arose in the desire"], for there is as yet no distinct recognition of a Nukva [female] in particular, except from Ima onward, as will be written in the coming Gates, God willing. Hence it is not a complete Zivug of male and female, Yesod in Yesod, but only a desire, in the secret of the Mochin, in a place where no distinct Nukva is present. The intent also refers to what was said: the MAN rose of itself to be corrected, without anyone raising it. This is Kad Salik beRe'uta — and not by means of the lower ones.
